worker_profile.launch_summary: pi implementer: provider=openai-codex model=gpt-5.6-sol reasoning=xhigh mode=fast

completed_slices.summary: Integrated the committed pond WebP as static, masked intro-only atmosphere; added purposeful frog, trace, landing, discrepancy, arrival, and water motion with complete reduced-motion fallbacks; preserved exact movement geometry and interaction semantics; hardened timed execution with generation invalidation; retained extreme 1–9 overrun evidence; and updated DESIGN/provenance records with bounded technical evidence and non-claims.
completed_slices.commit_message: feat(experiments): polish EX-0004 motion and pond atmosphere
tests_run: SMOKE_EXERCISES=EX-0004 npm --prefix experiments run test:smoke (8 tests passed)
Headless Chromium visual/instrumentation traversal at 1440px, 320px touch, and prefers-reduced-motion, including vertical predictions 8/9 and obstacle prediction 9
Independent final source/diff review: ACCEPT, no actionable regression

acceptance_status.criterion: The committed generated pond image is integrated only as replaceable atmosphere or framing; it carries no required state, answer, target quantity, readable text, logo, trademark, copied character, or branding, and it never introduces a competing perspective grid into the active mathematical corridor.
acceptance_status.evidence: Prototype.svelte imports the committed WebP only into an empty-alt, aria-hidden intro image. A shallow center-top crop, 18–22% opacity, and vertical mask keep it behind intro content; it is absent from active and success SVGs. Manual pixel review found no readable text, logo, watermark, trademark, copied character, branding, or recognizable source composition. Removing the image cannot change any exercise state.

acceptance_status.criterion: Purposeful motion makes frog takeoff, one-unit landing, two-unit obstacle leap, retained trace, discrepancy, and exact arrival easier to read; motion does not add timing skill or delay input unnecessarily.
acceptance_status.evidence: State still advances immediately on input and the existing 260ms automatic cadence remains unchanged. A 240ms inner-figure hop distinguishes a low one-unit arc from the higher double leap; segments draw from origin, permanent landing dots gain brief ripples, shortage/overshoot gains a retained labelled discrepancy, success settles at the endpoint, and slow perimeter ripples never move the grid. No animation event drives progression or gates input.

acceptance_status.criterion: Every active movement cell remains a true rendered square; ordinary horizontal and vertical displacement remains exactly one 10-unit cell side and the obstacle leap remains exactly two unit lengths in one action.
acceptance_status.evidence: The 120×100 viewBox, 10×10 SVG grid pattern, 6:5 rendered ratio, vectorFor() values {x:10,y:0}/{x:0,y:-10}, origins, and obstacle arithmetic remain unchanged. Instrumentation measured 65.5×65.5px desktop cells and 24.5×24.5px 320px cells; the double action produced one dashed 20-unit segment from unit 2 to unit 4.

acceptance_status.criterion: Reduced-motion mode preserves every final landing, trace, discrepancy, outcome label, focus transition, and completion path without required animation; keyboard and 320px touch paths remain equivalent.
acceptance_status.evidence: Reduced-motion predictions still apply all steps synchronously, and CSS disables frog, trace, landing, discrepancy-entry, water, arrival, and seal animation while leaving final state visible. Probes retained the short trace plus 'écart 2', exact success trace/frog/focus, and exact-coordinate vertical 8/9 and obstacle 9 overrun evidence with no page overflow. The smoke suite passed keyboard reduced-motion and 320px touch paths; the mobile frog target remained 44.1×44.1px.

acceptance_status.criterion: Intro, all four scenes, retry-in-place behavior, success, and completion retain existing deterministic smoke hooks and no stale animation callback can mutate a later scene.
acceptance_status.evidence: All data-smoke root/state/scene/plan/action/control/feedback/completion hooks remain. The 8-test smoke run passed, including EX-0004 retry-in-place and complete keyboard/touch traversal. Timed execution now captures a generation token checked before every step/resolution and invalidated by scene loading, retry, restart, and component destruction.

acceptance_status.criterion: DESIGN.md and asset provenance record the generated-art role, no-branding review, safe crop, motion rationale, desktop/320px review, and technical evidence without claiming learning efficacy or MES-02 approval.
acceptance_status.evidence: DESIGN.md and pond-garden-atmosphere.provenance.json now record intro-only replaceability, empty-alt/aria-hidden state boundaries, the exact masked crop, manual no-branding review, motion purpose and reduced-motion behavior, 1440px/320px measurements, extreme-overrun probes, and passing check/build/smoke/diff checks. Both explicitly withhold efficacy, accessibility-equivalence, MES-02, and promotion claims.

assumptions: Manual image inspection and headless rendered-state review are implementation evidence only; pupil efficacy, French comprehension, and practical accessibility equivalence remain untested.
The local bundled WebP request is permitted by the slice; no remote/network-service asset or runtime dependency was introduced.

completed_slices.summary: Integrated a provenance-backed safe crop of the generated terrace art as aria-hidden, replaceable atmosphere; coupled every roll state increment to one translated/rotated log interval with synchronized trace/contact motion and static reduced-motion equivalents; serialized tutorial rolls so the final turn settles before success; preserved calibration-only retry; strengthened deterministic hooks and full ordinary-motion, reduced-motion, six-scene, keyboard-only, 320px touch, focus, variant, outcome, and overflow smoke coverage; updated DESIGN.md and asset provenance. Independent review findings on ordinary-motion coverage, separate input routes, immediate reduced calibration, and delivery cleanliness were addressed before commit.
completed_slices.commit_message: feat(experiments): polish EX-0005 motion and atmosphere
tests_run: npm --prefix experiments run check — passed (0 errors, 0 warnings; catalog valid)
npm --prefix experiments run build — passed (safe derivative emitted as the only EX-0005 raster runtime asset)
SMOKE_EXERCISES=EX-0005 npm --prefix experiments run test:smoke — passed (11/11)
cd experiments && npx playwright test tests/smoke/ex-0005-log-roll.spec.ts — passed (4/4)
Desktop 1280px and mobile 320px rendered screenshot inspection — passed; measured scroll widths matched viewports

acceptance_status.criterion: The committed generated terrace image is integrated only as replaceable background atmosphere; it carries no required state, answer, path geometry, target quantity, readable text, logo, trademark, copied title treatment, or branding.
acceptance_status.evidence: A fixed 1060×648 safe derivative is imported locally by Prototype.svelte and RollStage.svelte, marked aria-hidden/pointer-inert, and rendered behind all authored SVG geometry. The full generated source is not emitted by the build. Visual review found no text, branding, character, landmark, target, count, or state in the runtime crop; provenance records why the source is not directly presented.

acceptance_status.criterion: Purposeful motion visibly couples each complete log rotation to exactly one invariant displacement and makes calibration, added rolls, short, over, and exact landings easier to inspect without adding timing, aiming, dragging, or motor precision.
acceptance_status.evidence: Each coveredRolls increment advances pointAt by one unchanged unit vector, changes signed rotation by 360°, moves the contact in sync, draws one pathLength-normalized interval, and settles one endpoint. Ordinary-motion smoke pauses the live CSS transition at an intermediate frame and confirms both non-final translation and active rotation, then checks equal consecutive displacements/turns/intervals plus ordinary calibration and added-roll phases. Short/over use one-shot hatched reveals and exact uses an endpoint halo; inputs remain native click/tap/key controls without timing or motor tasks.

acceptance_status.criterion: The first completed calibration roll remains at its endpoint through prediction and retry; retry removes only trial intervals and never returns to the origin or intro.
acceptance_status.evidence: Retry retains coveredRolls=1, one trace interval, rotation turn 1, the same variant id, and the unit label. Reduced and ordinary smoke paths both exercise failed prediction and recovery from the calibration endpoint.

acceptance_status.criterion: All six scenes preserve their authored straight-vector geometry, variant stability, deterministic smoke hooks, first-prediction distinction, and final retained evidence state.
acceptance_status.evidence: content.ts geometry/procedural semantics were unchanged; its module validation still passes. New scene/roll/trace/position/turn hooks are deterministic. Full six-scene touch and keyboard tests traverse broad, line, diagonal, reversed, and independence scenes, assert exact retained stages/traces, verify reversed signed turns, preserve the variant through retry, and confirm the independence first-prediction message.

acceptance_status.criterion: Reduced-motion mode preserves every complete interval, contact point, discrepancy, outcome label, focus transition, and completion path; keyboard and 320px touch routes remain equivalent with no overflow.
acceptance_status.evidence: Reduced mode now bypasses the calibration frame/timer waits and renders complete static traces/contacts/outcomes. Dedicated tests separately complete all six scenes by keyboard only and by touch at 320px, cover short/retry/exact focus movement and final completion focus, and assert document scrollWidth=320 throughout. The reduced desktop regression covers both short and over discrepancy labels/geometries.

acceptance_status.criterion: DESIGN.md and asset provenance record the generated-art role, no-branding review, safe crop, motion rationale, desktop/320px review, and technical evidence without claiming learning efficacy or MES-02 approval.
acceptance_status.evidence: DESIGN.md records exact motion timing/rationale, retry behavior, reduced equivalents, safe raster layering, desktop/320px review, regression evidence, and explicit evidence limits. assets/README.md and terrace-atmosphere.provenance.json record source-generation metadata, reference authority, crop coordinates, export settings, excluded landmarks/figures, no-branding/state review, integration role, responsive checks, and no learning/accessibility/MES-02 claims.

assumptions: The owner-approved committed generation may be presented through a deterministic derivative crop; the full source is retained solely for provenance and is not loaded because its central composition would exceed the originality fence.
Technical screenshot and smoke evidence supports implementation readiness only, not pupil comprehension, accessibility equivalence, learning efficacy, or MES-02 approval.
